info.title: Agent Paste Upload API
info.description: Signed-URL upload session lifecycle for Agent Paste artifacts.

post.summary: Create an upload session and mint signed PUT targets.

schema.description: Caller-provided idempotency key. Required on every mutation.

parameters.description: Caller-provided idempotency key. Required on every mutation.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

schema.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.

parameters.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.
parameters.name: X-Request-Id

429.description: Actor or workspace rate limit exceeded. Error code is rate_limited_actor or rate_limited_workspace.

put.summary: Upload a single file using a signed URL.

schema.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.

parameters.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.
parameters.name: X-Request-Id

429.description: Actor or workspace rate limit exceeded. Error code is rate_limited_actor or rate_limited_workspace.

post.summary: Finalize an upload session and create a draft revision.

schema.description: Caller-provided idempotency key. Required on every mutation.

parameters.description: Caller-provided idempotency key. Required on every mutation.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

schema.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.

parameters.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.
parameters.name: X-Request-Id

429.description: Actor or workspace rate limit exceeded. Error code is rate_limited_actor or rate_limited_workspace.
